title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kawamatsu, Hiyori, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I am worried about O-TOO, but...

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: Kawamatsu, I...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: resolve amongst the falling snow...I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is forbidden to rouse emotions before the start of a war.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will not go with you two to meet everyone yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Join together and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Protect Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PRINC! You cannot bow to us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nano Country- Kuri: Amigasa Village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: whoAAAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that true?

dialogue.speaker: Hiyori
dialogue.text: Lady Hiyori is alive!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That Tomboy said something so courteous!? She really has grown up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kawamatsu: I could only imagine the worst after you were caught....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where is she now...!? Is someone protecting her!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rest assured. We left her at a safe location.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Anyway, I am so glad!! Seriously!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Flying kiiiick!!

dialogue.speaker: Hiyori
dialogue.text: Hiyori...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was it you who saved her, zerojuro? I am forever grateful.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hiyori may be crude, but she is actually a weak cry- baby...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...Hey, momo...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How long are you gonna live in the past?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: She's 18 years older than you now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh!? A flying kick from someone 18 years older... that would hurt...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was she the beauty that was with you earlier!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MOMONOSUKE, IS THERE ANYTHING I CAN DO FOR YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't try to butter up to her older brother, you dumbass...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The preparations are complete!! Is this really okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, there is no turning back now....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sir Hitetsu! I retrieved this from Luffytaro in Udon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It is the Nidal Kitetsu.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, thank you. That boy just grabbed it without permission.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kitetsu!! Like I thought, it was a famous sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right, now... my name is Tenguyama Hitetsu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I am a bladesmith of wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: for 20 years... I have been waiting for the day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that I would be able to return these to the two of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The blade said to be able to cut even the skies, awe-no-habakiri.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the blade said to be able to slice through hell itself, Emma!! These are Lord Oden's beloved blades!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: said to be on the same level as shusui, these are two of the 21 great grade swords.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you think of my masterpiece, Lord Momoo- Suke!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... I think I am not yet ready for it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it... it is not because I am scared, but please hold on to it for a while longer.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As for Emma... it is now yours!! Let me just say this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone remember

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
